title: Malty Gooey Tunisian Dish Tagine
description: A rich and flavorful dish featuring a sweet and savory sauce, perfect for a date-night dinner. This Malty Gooey Tunisian Dish Tagine is an anti-inflammatory-friendly, iron-rich meal that will satisfy your sweet and savory cravings.

ingredients.name: Malted barley flour
ingredients.notes: Sifted and measured carefully to ensure the best results.

ingredients.name: Dates
ingredients.notes: Pitted and chopped for easy cooking.

ingredients.name: English mustard
ingredients.notes: Add a touch of spice to the dish.

ingredients.name: Coconut oil
ingredients.notes: For the best flavor, use high-quality coconut oil.

ingredients.name: Water
ingredients.notes: Fresh water for the best results.

ingredients.name: Rose water
ingredients.notes: For a touch of sweetness and a hint of rose flavor.

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Add the perfect balance of salt to the dish.

ingredients.name: Spices
ingredients.notes: Use a combination of spices to add depth and warmth to the dish.

instructions: Preheat the iron teppan to medium-high heat.
Add 1 tablespoon of coconut oil and melt it evenly.
